name: Fuel Consumption Calculator
description: Estimate rocket propellant mass flow rate from thrust and specific impulse.
formulaDescription: Mass flow rate is derived from thrust and specific impulse using g0 = 9.80665 m/s².

example.explanation: A 1,000,000 N thrust with 300 s Isp consumes about 340 kg/s of propellant.

faqs.question: What is specific impulse?
faqs.answer: Specific impulse measures how effectively a rocket uses propellant; higher Isp means more efficient engines.
